data.body: TS2 (09f9) CODE DONE + folded. Plan PASS+signed (1 remediation round: added intra-commit AC + fixed resolver glob/TYPE + genesis=CREATE-position + fail-closed git + v4-snapshot migration). Held-out TDD: 2 happy + 10 held-out ALL GREEN incl. commit-ancestry boundary, backdated KILLER test, intra-commit refinement both directions, fail-closed, resolved-record-shape, replay-never-rejects, reducer-purity, epoch-surface-absent. Teeth confirmed (neutralized revocation -> boundary+backdated RED). Recovered from git-checkout clobber of authorship.py (re-dispatched implementer). GIT SURGERY: folded into e165 commit -> e165'=c77f3ebc0 (change 563, Change-Id I06e62b5a preserved, rebar-ticket->09f9, deleted epoch e165 tests, added ts2 tests). Rebased 264f/2f13/3183/4b5b onto it; resolved 1 conflict in reducer/_state.py (dropped keyring_epoch, kept 3183 authorship presence-summary). e165' GREEN IN ISOLATION (17 targeted + 171 reducer). Stack HEAD now expectedly BROKEN at commit 7 (3183 verify_authorship.py/compact.py call removed epoch fns) - TS3 fixes. NEXT: TS3 (117b) reworks commit 7: in-toto payload cutover (_seam), verify-gate->verify_authorship_at_commit + in-toto parse + key_not_valid_at_era verdict, ledger schema {event_uuid,content_hash,signature,signer_pubkey,position}, create_placeholder alias, schema enum.
